Egan Storage Conditions for 04/14/2026


Notice Text:

The following restrictions will be in place on Egan Hub Storage (Egan) for Gas Day April 14, 2026:

                            

Egan has restricted excess injection nominations.  No increases to injection nominations will be allowed.

 

Egan has restricted excess withdrawal nominations.  No increases to withdrawal nominations will be allowed.

 

Due to the planned compressor station outage, Egan has restricted all injection, withdrawal and IWS rate schedule nominations to the following meters:

 

o   MR 45103 - COLUMBIA - STORAGE, LA (D40104/R40103)

o   MR 45105 - TENN. GAS - STORAGE, LA (D40106/40105)

o   MR 45113 - FGT-STORAGE, LA (D40114/R40113)

o   MR 45122 - KINDER MORGAN (R)INJ 40122/ (D) WTD 40123

o   MR 40111 - TARGA LOUISIANA FIELD SERVICES LLC

o   MR 45109 - TRUNKLINE - STORAGE, LA (D40110/R40109)

 

Due to the planned compressor station outage, Egan has scheduled and sealed all injection and IWS rate schedule nominations to the following meters:

 

o   MR 45101 - ANR - STORAGE, LA (D40102/R40101)

o   MR 45107 - TEXAS GAS - STORAGE, LA (D40108/R40107)

o   MR 45109 - TRUNKLINE - STORAGE, LA (D40110/R40109)

o   MR 45115 - TEXAS EASTERN - STORAGE, LA (D40116/R40115)

 

Due to the planned compressor station outage, Egan has scheduled and sealed all withdrawal and IWS rate schedule nominations to the following meters:

 

o   45101 - ANR - STORAGE, LA (D40102/R40101)

o   45115 - TEXAS EASTERN - STORAGE, LA (D40116/R40115)

 

 

Please contact your Operations Account Representative if you have any questions.

 

 



BackPrint

Egan Storage Conditions for 04/14/2026


Notice Text:

The following restrictions will be in place on Egan Hub Storage (Egan) for Gas Day April 14, 2026:

                            

Egan has restricted excess injection nominations.  No increases to injection nominations will be allowed.

 

Egan has restricted excess withdrawal nominations.  No increases to withdrawal nominations will be allowed.

 

Due to the planned compressor station outage, Egan has restricted all injection, withdrawal and IWS rate schedule nominations to the following meters:

 

o   MR 45103 - COLUMBIA - STORAGE, LA (D40104/R40103)

o   MR 45105 - TENN. GAS - STORAGE, LA (D40106/40105)

o   MR 45113 - FGT-STORAGE, LA (D40114/R40113)

o   MR 45122 - KINDER MORGAN (R)INJ 40122/ (D) WTD 40123

o   MR 40111 - TARGA LOUISIANA FIELD SERVICES LLC

o   MR 45109 - TRUNKLINE - STORAGE, LA (D40110/R40109)

 

Due to the planned compressor station outage, Egan has scheduled and sealed all injection and IWS rate schedule nominations to the following meters:

 

o   MR 45101 - ANR - STORAGE, LA (D40102/R40101)

o   MR 45107 - TEXAS GAS - STORAGE, LA (D40108/R40107)

o   MR 45109 - TRUNKLINE - STORAGE, LA (D40110/R40109)

o   MR 45115 - TEXAS EASTERN - STORAGE, LA (D40116/R40115)

Please contact your Operations Account Representative if you have any questions.
